---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for DevFolio Pro
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short, one-line description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it?
_e.g. "As a Pro user, I want to export my portfolio as a PDF so I can attach it to job applications."_

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like it to work. Be as specific or as rough as you like — sketches, mockups, and pseudocode all welcome.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem? Why is your proposed solution preferable?

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or prior art (e.g. how a competing product handles this).

## Plan / Priority (optional)

If you have a sense of complexity or priority, share it here.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Estimated complexity | Small / Medium / Large |
| Affects plan(s) | Free / Pro / Team / All |
